---
title: "About"
subtitle: "Bioinformatician, Researcher, Educator & Entrepreneur"
title-block-banner: true
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: venture-list
    contents: ventures.yml
    template: ../_templates/venture-card.ejs
  - id: education-list
    contents: education.yml
    template: ../_templates/education-card.ejs
  - id: certificate-list
    contents: certificates.yml
    template: ../_templates/certificate-card.ejs
---

```{=html}
<div class="ab-section-header">
<h2 class="ab-section-title">Entrepreneurial Journey</h2>
<p class="ab-section-sub">Ventures founded and led in bioinformatics, research, and education</p>
</div>
```

::: {#venture-list}
:::

```{=html}
<div class="ab-section-header">
<h2 class="ab-section-title">Education and Training</h2>
<p class="ab-section-sub">Academic background and formal training</p>
</div>
```

::: {#education-list}
:::

```{=html}
<div class="ab-section-header">
<h2 class="ab-section-title">Online Certificates</h2>
<p class="ab-section-sub">Continuing education and professional development</p>
</div>
```

::: {#certificate-list}
:::
